ddls:
CREATE TABLE "health_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health class */,
  "topic_id" TEXT /* ID of the health topic */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the health data */,
  "data_value_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit used to measure the data value */,
  "data_value_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of the data value */,
  "data_value_footnote_symbol" TEXT /* Footnote symbol for the data value */,
  "data_value_footnote" TEXT /* Footnote for the data value */,
  "stratification_1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first stratification */,
  "stratification_1_value" TEXT /* Value of the first stratification */,
  "stratification_2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second stratification */,
  "stratification_2_value" TEXT /* Value of the second stratification */,
  "geographic_level" TEXT /* Geographic level of the data (e.g., County, State) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_stratification_1_id FOREIGN KEY ("stratification_1_id") REFERENCES stratifications ("stratification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES health_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_stratification_2_id FOREIGN KEY ("stratification_2_id") REFERENCES stratifications ("stratification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_data_value_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_value_type_id") REFERENCES data_value_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_data_value_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_value_unit_id") REFERENCES data_value_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES health_topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the location (e.g., AK for Alaska) */,
  "location_desc" TEXT /* Description of the location (e.g., Aleutians East) */,
  "geographic_level" TEXT /* Geographic level of the location (e.g., County, State) */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the location (e.g., (55.440626, -161.962562)) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., NVSS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the health class (e.g., Cardiovascular Diseases) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the health class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the health class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_topics" (
  "topic_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each health topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the health topic (e.g., Heart Disease Mortality) */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health class to which the topic belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the health topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the health topic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stratifications" (
  "stratification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stratification */,
  "stratification_name" TEXT /* Name of the stratification (e.g., Overall) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the stratification (e.g., Gender, Race/Ethnicity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stratification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stratification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stratification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stratification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_value_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., per 100,000 population) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the unit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_value_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data value type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data value type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data value type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data value type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data value type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the health data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the health data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data point being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the health data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the health data was versioned */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data point being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data point being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_ratings_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role to which the permission belongs */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the role is assigned */,
  "role" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
